block_goal: Improve Kanban board and shared layout by moving branding to header, aligning header borders, and optimizing board grid for 5-column display.
architect_instructions_for_orchestrator: Run PM plan review before execution and do not dispatch any task until Architect confirms the reviewed plan.
Preserve unrelated uncommitted files in the worktree and keep each worker strictly inside the declared write scope.
Materialize task packets mechanically from the export spec without paraphrasing task content.
Do not start a dependent slice until its prerequisites are accepted.
global_rules: Keep the UI stack server-rendered with Django Templates, HTMX, and shared CSS; do not introduce a new frontend framework or build pipeline.
Ensure that branding move does not break the sidebar toggle button or breadcrumb visibility.
CSS changes should maintain alignment between the sidebar header and the site header for a cohesive top-of-page visual line.
global_acceptance: The branding link is successfully moved to the site header, to the right of the sidebar toggle.
Breadcrumbs (header_context) appear on the same horizontal line as the branding in the site header.
The bottom border of the sidebar header and the site header align vertically on the same Y-axis.
The Kanban board grid displays 5 columns without horizontal overflow on standard desktop resolutions (e.g., 1440px width).
global_invariants: The project remains a Django-HTMX monorepo with no external JS dependencies added in this block.
The sidebar toggle functionality (JavaScript `toggleSidebar()`) must remain operational.
No changes to business logic or model schemas are permitted.

slices.title: Header and Branding Polish
slices.goal: Move branding to the site header and align the top visual borders between sidebar and main header.
forbidden_moves: Do not remove the sidebar toggle button.
Do not change the underlying HTMX CSRF headers or block structure in base.html.
control_points: Branding is to the right of the toggle button.
Breadcrumbs are inline with the brand.
acceptance_criteria: Branding is visible in the site header.
Sidebar header is empty or reduced but its border aligns with site header.
Site header breadcrumbs are correctly positioned.

tasks.goal: Move branding from sidebar to site header and ensure breadcrumb alignment.
implementation_notes: Move the `<a href="..." class="brand">` block from `.sidebar-header` to `.site-header-main` in `templates/base.html`.
Adjust `.site-header-main` CSS to use flexbox for horizontal alignment of toggle, brand, and breadcrumbs.
Ensure `.sidebar-header` and `.site-header` have matching heights or border offsets in `app.css` to achieve vertical alignment of their bottom borders.
deliverables: Updated templates/base.html with new header layout
Updated static/src/css/app.css with header alignment fixes
escalate_if: Header changes break the sidebar toggle animation
Breadcrumb content overflows the header on narrow screens

slices.title: Kanban Grid Optimization
slices.goal: Adjust the Kanban board grid to allow 5 columns without horizontal scrolling.
forbidden_moves: Do not change the board column rendering logic in Django views.
Do not remove the `minmax` safety in CSS.
control_points: Board grid accommodates 5 columns within the viewport.
acceptance_criteria: 5 columns are visible simultaneously on a 1440px wide screen without a horizontal scrollbar on the board container.

tasks.goal: Optimize the `.board-grid` CSS calculation for 5-column display.
implementation_notes: Reduce the `min-width` (currently 235px) in the `minmax()` function to allow 5 columns to fit. Suggested value: 200px or 210px.
Verify the `calc()` portion of the formula correctly accounts for the sidebar width and gaps when 5 slots are visible.
deliverables: Updated static/src/css/app.css with optimized grid formula
escalate_if: Reducing min-width makes Kanban cards unreadably narrow
The overflow persists even with reduced min-width
